display_text: Slime Vial, Cost: 0: Tier 4 neutral item providing +12 HP regeneration. Active ability (Instant Cast, No Target) throws a vial, creating a Slime Spill that deals 125 damage and slows enemy movement speed by 35% and attack speed by 30 for 4 seconds in a 550 radius. Heroes in the spill also grant +15 armor to their allies. Stats: CD: 27s, Radius: 550, Spill Speed: 350, Debuff Duration: 4s.
